description_long: This is a rustic wooden picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, constructed from thick, roughly hewn planks. The tabletop and benches are made from parallel wooden slats, giving the surface a natural, textured appearance. The table is supported by sturdy cylindrical log legs and crossbeams, providing stability and a robust outdoor aesthetic. The wood shows a weathered finish with visible grain patterns and some color variation, suggesting it is designed for outdoor use. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware, emphasizing a simple, functional design. The overall structure is low to the ground and wide, making it suitable for communal seating in parks or recreational areas.
description: A rustic wooden picnic table with attached benches, made from thick, weathered planks and cylindrical log supports. The design is robust and functional, ideal for outdoor communal seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tabletop and one attached bench, highlighting the thickness of the wood and the cylindrical log supports.
description_view_1: Angled view from the end, displaying the tabletop and both benches, as well as the crossbeam supports beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other bench and the sturdy log construction.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, revealing the tabletop, both benches, and the supporting structure underneath.
